title: oncidium miniatum
intro: Oncidium miniatum, also known as the miniature oncidium, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe. Native to Mexico and Central America, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oncidium miniatum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
